title: Generator primitives (UI)
description: Live apply must compose hub + devices + dashboard + alert from plant spec, not DOMAIN_CATALOG templates.
prompt: Describe a small monitoring plant with two devices and an overview dashboard plus one alert; generate it and verify devices in Explorer and the dashboard in Operator.
uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste the plant description into AI Studio solution generator.
Verify two devices in Explorer and overview in Operator; check Alarms.
